## The idea

<!-- What would you like to see? Be concrete — mockups, example output, or a link to similar work all help. -->

## Why it matters

<!-- What problem does this solve? Who benefits? -->

## Scope

- [ ] `dashboard/index.html` (static viewer)
- [ ] `README.md` / `README.zh-TW.md` (docs / translations)
- [ ] New `schemas/*.schema.json` field (note: coordinated release — see `docs/COMPAT.md`)
- [ ] Something else (describe)

## Out-of-scope reminder

If the feature requires changes to how reports are **generated** (new
metrics, new tickers, new analysis models), that work happens in the
private engine repo — this issue can still help us prioritise, but the
implementation won't land here directly.
